Strings.String: This file is a scope 4 type file. It contains user network variable types, configuration property types, and the enumeration types that support them.
This file was created and is maintained by Distech Controls Inc., Canada. Contact us at 1-450-444-9898, or at www.distech-controls.com on the Internet.
This is a scope 4 FPT file. It contains functional profile templates.
This LonMark Device Resource FPT file was created by Distech Controls. Contact us at (450) 449-5552 or at www.distech-controls.com on the internet.
This file is a scope 4 language-dependent string resource file. It is localized for the US English (enu) language.
This LonMark Device Resource language-string file was created by Distech Controls. Contact us at (450) 449-5552 or at www.distech-controls.com on the internet.
